tokens_note: All raw hex/rgba values must map to Bodhi tokens (text-h*, text-mini, text-text-*, bg-surface-*, border-border-*) at build time. See 01_figma_variables.json #note.

sections.purpose: Top navigation — instance of existing SiteHeader

components.notes: Figma shows the canonical header instance with nav items (Teacher Courses, Advanced Certifications, Yoga Courses, Workshops, Our Centers, About Bodhi) and 'Enquire Now' pill. Existing component already matches — no edits.

sections.purpose: Hero copy block on top + two-column grid (info cards left, enquiry form right) below it

layout.outer: flex flex-col gap-[41px] items-start, max-w-[1399px], left:261, top:168

extension_needs: Header block sits ABOVE the two-column row (not inside the left column) — current implementation nests title/subhead in left column above info cards. Restructure: hero_block (eyebrow + h1 + paragraph, max-w 892px) on its own row, then below it grid[620px | 710px] gap-[59px].
Hero paragraph max-width should be 892px (full hero block width), not 'max-w-xl' (~576px).
Title is 'Contact us' (h1, Host Grotesk Bold 60px, leading 58px, tracking -0.56px, color #000) — currently rendered as h2.
Eyebrow 'NEW SECTION 23 courses' should render uppercase, Manrope SemiBold 12px, tracking 2.42px, color #000 (Figma) — current uses text-text-primary which is fine; verify the token resolves to #000.
Info card list gap should be 13px (not gap-5 = 20px).
Row gap between hero block and two-column row should be 41px (not mt-10 = 40px — close, but make explicit).
Column grid gap should be exactly 59px on lg+ (not 80px / 120px). Update to lg:gap-[59px].
Right column width is fixed 710px — current `lg:grid-cols-[1fr_710px]` is correct, keep.

props.title: Contact us
props.subhead: Accredited, women-centred teacher training programmes rooted in the authentic eight-limbed path of Hatha-Raja Yoga.

components.notes: Keep the (existing) Lucide icon mapping (Phone, Mail, MapPin). Office location is a single string in Figma (no line break) — drop the embedded `\n` from current defaults.

extension_needs: Card bg #ffffff with backdrop-blur 30.1px, border 1px solid rgba(178,178,178,0.32), radius 23px — map to bg-surface-* / border-border-* tokens. Current card likely uses similar surface but verify radius is rounded-[23px] not rounded-2xl (16px).
Mobile + Email cards are 84px tall (single-line value); Office card is 117px tall (two-line value). Drive height from content via padding, do not hard-code.
Icon sits at (22, 30) for 84px cards, (22, 40-ish vertically centered to first line) for office card — icon column 24px wide, gap to text 19px (65 - 22 - 24 = 19).
Label color #00af88 (NOT #000) — Manrope Regular 12px, tracking 2.42px, uppercase, leading 17px. Make label color prop-driven or hard-code brand mint.
Value color #000, DM Sans Medium 20px, leading 27px.
components.notes: Drives the 3 info cards in the left column. One component, three instances.

extension_needs: REMOVE lastName field — Figma has only 4 fields: First name, Mobile number, Email, 'What can we help with?'.
REMOVE message textarea — Figma replaces it with a single-line 'What can we help with?' input (64px height, same as other inputs). Keep the field semantic name `helpWith` (or rename `message` to it).
Rename phone -> mobile? Keep `phone` key for back-compat but label it 'Mobile number'.
Add VISIBLE labels above each input (NOT sr-only). Label style: DM Sans Light 16px, color #122e29, 9px gap to input.
Field gap should be 21px between field groups (current: gap-[21px] — keep).
Form -> submit gap: 26px (currently the submit is part of the gap-[21px] chain — add explicit margin-top or wrap in flex with gap-[26px] between fields-block and submit).
Input height 64px (current h-16 = 64px — keep). Radius 18px (current rounded-2xl = 16px — change to rounded-[18px]).
Input bg rgba(247,247,247,0.82) with backdrop-blur 30.1px (current bg-surface-1 may not match exactly — verify token).
Input border 1px solid #e4e4e4 (map to border-border-* token).
Placeholder color #738080, font DM Sans Regular 18px (current uses text-text-tertiary — verify visual).
Placeholders per Figma: 'Your name' / '+ 91  8123456789' / 'you@example.com' / 'Course details, partnerships, scheduling…'.
Submit button: full width, h-16, radius 18px, bg #8ee0ce, text color #243a42, font DM Sans SemiBold 16px, label 'Send Message'. Map bg to brand-shade or brand-primary token.
Validation: drop lastName + message requireds; helpWith is optional in Figma (no asterisk shown) — keep optional.
components.notes: Single-line 'What can we help with?' input — Figma's intent is a short subject line, not a long message body. Current ContactForm has a 160px-tall textarea — that must be replaced with a regular input.

sections.purpose: Closing CTA on dark teal background — Bodhi wordmark, 'Begin where you are.' headline with italic mint accent, supporting paragraph, 'Try a class, free' pill

props.paragraph: Whether you want to teach, heal a specific thing, or simply move and breathe with people once a week — there's a door at Bodhi for that.

components.notes: Verify the existing component renders these exact strings and the mint italic accent. If props are hard-coded, may need a minor extend to accept overrides — but assume reuse-as-is until builder confirms.

sections.purpose: Dark teal site footer — brand column + 3 link columns (School / Visit / Stay close) + copyright row

components.notes: Existing component already matches the Figma footer layout. No edits required.

structure: <ContactSection eyebrow='23 courses' title='Contact us' subhead={...} infoCards={...} />
page_assembly.notes: ContactSection internally renders ContactInfoCard x3 and ContactForm. The page composition only wires the 4 top-level blocks.

image_assets.note: Figma uses raster icon assets, but the codebase already uses lucide-react (Phone, Mail, MapPin) which is the project-preferred approach. Do NOT download the raster assets — keep Lucide.

uncertain.reason: 'What can we help with?' input is 64px tall in Figma (same as other inputs) but the field's semantic intent suggests a longer message. Confirmed with user-provided context: render as single-line input, NOT a textarea. Resolved.
footer-brand-cta.tsx may have hard-coded copy. If the existing copy already matches ('Begin where you are.' + 'Try a class, free'), kind stays reuse-as-is. If not, downgrade to extend.

Hero supporting paragraph copy ('Accredited, women-centred teacher training programmes…') reads like a Teacher Training description, not a Contact-page subhead. Possibly placeholder copy reused from another frame. Keep verbatim from Figma — flag for content review post-launch.
